news.title: Spotify introduces verified artist badges to help distinguish humans from AI

news.title: Netflix wants you to watch ‘Clips,’ its TikTok-like vertical video feed
news.summary: Netflix is redesigning its mobile app and introducing Clips, a vertical video feed intended to help users discover new content by sharing highlights from original Netflix programming.

news.title: Verified by Spotify badge lets you know this artist isn’t AI

news.title: Here’s what Netflix’s new vertical video feed is like
news.summary: Netflix is starting to roll out a big revamp of its mobile app, and a central feature is a new vertical video feed called "Clips" where you can scroll through clips of shows, movies, and other Netflix content.
